title: Class Teachers' Experiences of COVID-19 Pandemic 2021
description: The data consists of interviews in which classroom teachers reflect on their experiences of distance education in 2020. The data is a follow-up to FSD3733 Classroom Teachers' Experiences of Distance Teaching 2020. The respondents are primary school teachers, and the numbering of the interviewees is consistent with FSD3733 and FSD3948 datasets.
